title: jasminum neocaledonicum
intro: Jasminum neocaledonicum, also known as the New Caledonian jasmine, is a flowering plant species within the genus Jasminum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jasminum neocaledonicum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its benefits.
